case_title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. CHARMEYNNE WHEELER ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WHEELER, CHARMEYNNE , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
